about.title: About Sarmadax
about.subtitle: The story behind the code
about.story: Sarmadax was born from a simple belief: great software needs both exceptional design and solid engineering. Founded by a software engineer with a passion for design, we bridge the gap between beautiful interfaces and powerful backends.
about.mission: To help businesses transform their ideas into scalable digital products that make a real impact. We combine technical expertise with creative vision to deliver solutions that stand out.
about.founderBio: A full-stack software engineer and graphic designer with a passion for building products that look stunning and work flawlessly. Specializing in SaaS development, modern web applications, and AI integration.

1.name: Khalid Al-Otaibi
1.text: Sarmadax delivered our SaaS platform in under 6 weeks — clean code, flawless Arabic RTL, and a design our clients immediately trusted. Best tech investment we've made.

2.name: Omar Abdel-Fattah
2.text: We needed a complex logistics dashboard with real-time tracking and Arabic support. Sarmadax nailed every requirement and went beyond what we asked for. Highly recommend.

3.name: Rania Mustafa
3.text: Our e-commerce app launched to 30K+ downloads in the first three weeks. The interface feels premium, performance is excellent, and the team was responsive at every step.

4.name: Yousef Al-Hammadi
4.text: From a rough idea to a polished fintech web app in one month. Sarmadax understood the local market, handled compliance requirements, and delivered ahead of schedule.

electroerp.tagline: Full-stack ERP meets e-commerce — one platform to run an entire electrical supplies business
electroerp.challenge: The client was operating an electrical supplies business across four disconnected tools — spreadsheets for inventory, a standalone accounting app, manual HR records, and zero online presence. Data had to be re-entered across every system, errors were frequent, and there was no unified view of the business. Scaling was impossible.
electroerp.solution: We built a single platform that unified every part of the business. The customer-facing side is a full e-commerce storefront. Behind it sits a complete ERP — inventory management with low-stock alerts, double-entry accounting with invoices and purchase orders, an HR module covering employees, salaries, and attendance, and a POS system with thermal printer support. Full Arabic RTL and bilingual throughout.
electroerp.result1: Replaced 4+ separate tools with a single system
electroerp.result2: Real orders processed daily at himmat.store
electroerp.result4: Staff work in Arabic or English seamlessly

printshop.tagline: A print-on-demand platform that lets clients design, order, and pay — all without picking up the phone
printshop.challenge: Harfoush Print Shop was handling every custom order by phone and in-person. Clients had no way to visualize their print before ordering, staff spent hours manually tracking jobs, payment was cash-only, and there was no way to manage order status at scale. Growth was bottlenecked by the manual process.
printshop.solution: We built a full print-on-demand web platform with an interactive visual design builder — clients drag, drop, and customize their prints in the browser before ordering. Orders flow through an admin dashboard, payments are processed via Paymob, and customers get automated WhatsApp, SMS, and email notifications at every stage. Deployed as a PWA for a native-like mobile experience.
printshop.result2: Live and processing orders at harfoushprint.com

tajdera.tagline: The Sudanese budget tracker that roasts you into saving money
tajdera.challenge: Most personal finance apps are dry, forgettable, and abandoned within days. People know they overspend but charts and alerts don't change behavior. The challenge was to build something that creates a genuine emotional reaction — something users actually come back to.
tajdera.solution: We built a gamified budget tracker with a 'shame meter' that calculates your financial health tier (safe → warning → danger → bankrupt) and fires AI-style sarcastic roasts based on your spending patterns. Four expense categories, three roast intensity levels, and shareable roast cards. Fully offline — no backend, no account, instant load.
tajdera.result1: 50+ unique roast messages across 4 shame tiers
tajdera.result4: Users engage with their finances because it's fun

portfolio.tagline: A developer portfolio that proves design and engineering can coexist at the highest level
portfolio.challenge: Generic portfolio templates look the same. The goal was to build something that immediately signals senior-level craft — in both code quality and visual design — while also being fully bilingual and performant.
portfolio.solution: Built with Next.js and Framer Motion, featuring a custom magnetic cursor, smooth scroll animations, staggered section reveals, and 3D card effects. Fully bilingual Arabic/English with RTL layout switching, a contact form powered by Resend, and optimized for Core Web Vitals.
portfolio.result1: Stands out immediately from template portfolios
portfolio.result4: Contact form wired to real email via Resend

caseStudies.ctaDesc: Let's talk about your project and build something you're proud of.

rudd.tagline: Your WhatsApp, powered by AI — books appointments and qualifies leads while you sleep
rudd.challenge: Small business owners in MENA lose dozens of leads every week because they can't respond to WhatsApp inquiries fast enough. Manually booking appointments, sending reminders, and following up with leads is a full-time job — one most businesses can't afford to staff properly.
rudd.solution: Rudd connects to your WhatsApp Business account and Google Calendar, then deploys an AI agent that handles the entire booking flow conversationally — in Arabic or English. It qualifies the lead, checks calendar availability, books the appointment, and sends confirmation — all without human intervention. Built on Next.js 15, OpenAI function calling, Inngest for durable async workflows, and Clerk for multi-tenant auth.
rudd.result1: Businesses capture leads 24/7 with zero staff overhead
rudd.result2: AI handles full booking conversation in Arabic and English
rudd.result3: Google Calendar synced — no double bookings ever
rudd.result4: Durable workflows survive server restarts and timeouts

pricingPage.subtitle: Fixed-price packages. Know exactly what you get and what you pay — before a single line of code is written.

launch.name: Launch
launch.tagline: Full web app or SaaS MVP

pricingPage.addOnsDesc: Stack onto any package to extend its scope
pricingPage.step1Desc: 30-min discovery session. Tell me about your project, goals, and timeline. No commitment, no pitch.
pricingPage.step2Desc: Custom scope document and fixed-price quote delivered within 24 hours of our call.
pricingPage.step3Desc: 50% upfront, 50% when you approve the final product. Not happy? We keep working until you are.
pricingPage.g1Desc: Full source code, assets, and IP transfer on completion. Zero lock-in, ever.
pricingPage.g2Desc: We don't call it done until you're genuinely happy with every detail. Included.
pricingPage.g3Desc: The quote is final. No scope creep invoices, no surprise charges. Ever.
pricingPage.g4Desc: We set a delivery date and honor it. If we miss it, the delay is on us.
pricingPage.faq1q: What if I need changes after launch?
pricingPage.faq1a: Every package includes post-launch support — 2 weeks for Spark, 1 month for Launch. Anything beyond that is billed at an agreed hourly rate, which we set upfront.
pricingPage.faq2q: How does the 50/50 payment split work?
pricingPage.faq2a: 50% is due before we start — this covers design and early development. The remaining 50% is only due when you have approved the final product. You hold all the leverage.
pricingPage.faq3q: Do I get the source code?
pricingPage.faq3a: Yes — 100%. On final payment, all code, assets, and repository access transfer to you. You own everything, forever, no strings attached.
pricingPage.faq4q: My project doesn't fit these packages.
pricingPage.faq4a: The Scale package is fully custom, and we can build a bespoke quote for any scope. Just book a free call and we will figure it out together.
pricingPage.faq5q: How fast can you actually start?
pricingPage.faq5a: Within 1–3 business days of the first payment. We keep a limited number of spots open each month to ensure every project gets the full focus it deserves.
pricingPage.faq6q: Can you work with an existing codebase?
pricingPage.faq6a: Absolutely. We can extend your current codebase or build from your existing design files. We will scope it together on the discovery call.
pricingPage.ctaTitle: Ready to build something people love?
pricingPage.ctaDesc: Book a free 30-minute discovery call. No pitch, no pressure — just an honest conversation about your project and how to make it real.
